description: A painting showing a hillside cemetery with numerous white headstones arranged in rows along terraced green lawns. Flowering plants — roses and other blooms — grow around many of the graves. Paths wind between the sections. Trees and hedges border the grounds, and in the background, low hills and distant buildings are visible under a pale sky. The perspective is elevated, looking down across the cemetery in a flattened, map-like composition. The style is detailed and precise, with a naive quality to the spatial arrangement.
